findings.description: The NC Water Resources Environmental Quality logo in the HTML appears slightly different in rendering quality but is present and correctly placed.
findings.evidence: PDF shows the logo at top-left with clear rendering; HTML shows the same logo at top-left but with slightly different sizing. Both are functional.

findings.description: The header information (PAT MCCRORY, Governor, DONALD R. VAN DER VAART, Secretary, S. JAY ZIMMERMAN, Director) is right-aligned in the PDF but left-aligned in the HTML.
findings.evidence: PDF: header info is right-aligned on the page. HTML: same info is left-aligned under the logo. Layout difference but content preserved.

findings.description: Footer contact information (State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality | Water Resources, address, phone) appears at the bottom of page 1 in the PDF, but in the HTML it appears between the outline section and Section I content.
findings.evidence: PDF: footer info at very bottom of page 1. HTML: same info appears mid-page between the outline and Section I, disrupting reading flow.

findings.description: A colored decorative bar appears in the HTML between the footer info and Section I that does not appear in the PDF at that location.
findings.evidence: HTML shows a dark gradient/colored bar between contact info and Section I heading. PDF has a simple line under MEMORANDUM heading.

findings.description: In the PDF, bullet point topic headers are bold and underlined (e.g., 'Beneficial Reuse Areas', 'Costs'). In the HTML, they appear bold but the underline styling varies.
findings.evidence: PDF page 3: topic headers like 'Beneficial Reuse Areas', 'Dam Safety' are bold and underlined. HTML: same headers appear bold with underline, formatting is preserved.

findings.description: S. Jay Zimmerman's name is rendered as an ordered list item ('A. JAY ZIMMERMAN') due to the 'S.' being interpreted as a list marker in the HTML structure.
findings.evidence:
PDF: 'S. JAY ZIMMERMAN / Director'. HTML: '
  1. JAY ZIMMERMAN
    Director
' — The 'S.' prefix is lost and replaced by 'A.' list formatting.

findings.description: The name 'S. JAY ZIMMERMAN' is altered to effectively display as 'A. JAY ZIMMERMAN' due to incorrect list parsing, changing the Director's initial.
findings.evidence: PDF header: 'S. JAY ZIMMERMAN'. HTML renders as ordered list item 'A' resulting in 'A. JAY ZIMMERMAN'.

findings.description: The footer text (State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality | Water Resources, address, phone number) appears as body content between the outline and Section I, duplicating what already appears at the top of the page.
findings.evidence: HTML includes 'State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality | Water Resources / 1611 Mail service Center | Raleigh, North Carolina 27699-1611 / 919 707 9000' as inline body content after the outline section. This is a page footer artifact from the PDF.

findings.description: A second embedded image tag appears between the outline and Section I that corresponds to a page-break artifact.
findings.evidence: HTML: '' appears as an extra image between sections with no descriptive alt text.
